summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that TDG is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $1195.94. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 64.3%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $1294.03 and a significant trendline confluence around $1282.91 (formed by 11 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
